author: codex
scope: Codex-only deterministic/manual relation cleanup prep; no provider-backed commands, post-ingest LLM harnesses, materialize/export-jsonl/full validate/DB publish, generated-output edits, durable retirements, replacement submissions, LOG edits, manifest edits, canonical/generated edits, or code edits applied

checkpoint_context.not_repeated: relation047 was intentionally skipped per owner instruction; this prep uses relation048.

bucket.name: singleton operated_by entity-to-event row that should be has_timeline_event entity-to-event
bucket.cleanup_direction: data cleanup only; keep operated_by scoped to project|route|corridor -> entity
bucket.rationale: The cited source states that Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at Nanuet station. That is timeline/event semantics for Metro-North, not an operated_by relation whose object is an event. Current endpoint rules already admit has_timeline_event entity -> event.

endpoint_shape_valid_under_packages_pipe.original_endpoint_shape_issue: Relation kind operated_by expects project|route|corridor -> entity, got entity -> event.

evidence_supports_metro_north_timeline_e.summary: The cited block states that Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at Nanuet station in Rockland County. The existing event record for the same local id is a station improvement opening with lifecycle_phase launched and date_normalized 2022-05. Reusing the cited evidence preserves the source-backed assertion while correcting the relation kind.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station

no_generated_files_edited.note: The shared worktree already contains generated-output and other edits owned by others. This task writes only data/review_notes/codex-relation-cleanup-batch048-prep.json and does not edit retired.json, submissions, canonical JSONL, materialized data, wiki output, LOG, manifest, code, or generated files.

local_validation.tooling: Read-only rg/jq/sed inspection plus bun --eval createSubmissionEntry/relationEndpointShapeIssue dry-runs using direct local imports; no appendSubmission, materialize, export-jsonl, full validate, DB publish, provider-backed command, or generated-output command run.

retire.original_object_name: Nanuet Station Rebuilt Platform Shelter Opening

current_args.label: Metro-North operated Nanuet Station
current_args.raw_text: This past Thursday, Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station in Rockland County.

payload.description: Metro-North opened the Nanuet station platform shelter

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station

proposed_retired_json_entry.reason: Codex relation cleanup batch048 replaces malformed operated_by entity -> event relation relation_nanuet-shelter-metronorth with validator-compatible has_timeline_event entity -> event relation preserving the Metro-North/Nanuet shelter opening evidence.

retire.reason: The cited source supports Metro-North having a timeline event for opening the rebuilt Nanuet station shelter. It does not support an operated_by relation where an entity is operated by an event.

id_generation.method: createSubmissionEntry(runId, rawToolArgs, '2026-06-23T00:00:00.000Z') with relationEndpointIssues added; stable hash is over normalized tool_args.

tool_args.label: Metro-North has Nanuet shelter opening timeline event
tool_args.raw_text: This past Thursday, Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station in Rockland County.

payload.description: Metro-North has a timeline event for opening the rebuilt platform shelter at Nanuet station.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station

raw_tool_args_for_replay.label: Metro-North has Nanuet shelter opening timeline event
raw_tool_args_for_replay.raw_text: This past Thursday, Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station in Rockland County.

payload.description: Metro-North has a timeline event for opening the rebuilt platform shelter at Nanuet station.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North opened the rebuilt platform shelter at the Nanuet station

commands_run_read_only: bun --eval '<createSubmissionEntry dry-run for relation048 replacement; no appendSubmission>'
bun --eval '<relationEndpointShapeIssue dry-run for original and replacement shapes>'

jq -c 'select(.submission_id=="sub_cab015e3bdf99834" or .submission_id=="sub_be8b06e56a4e4e49") | {submission_id, run_id, state:.validation.state, source_id:.tool_args.source_id, kind:.tool_args.observation_kind, local:.tool_args.local_observation_id, label:.tool_args.label, payload:.tool_args.payload}' data/submissions/*.jsonl

apply_steps: Add the proposed_retired_json_entry for sub_8a68d427e6db5675 to data/submission-overrides/retired.json.
Append the proposed replacement entry sub_dd404ac2059c3401 to data/submissions/2026-06-23_codex_relation_cleanup_batch048.jsonl.
Do not change relation endpoint-shape validator rules for this cleanup.
